mapper.insert: INSERT INTO player_stats (player_id, team_id, league_id, season, appearances, goals, assists, yellow_cards, red_cards, rating, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{playerId}, #{teamId}, #{leagueId}, #{season}, #{appearances}, #{goals}, #{assists}, #{yellowCards}, #{redCards}, #{rating}, NOW(), NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE team_id = VALUES(team_id), appearances = VALUES(appearances), goals = VALUES(goals), assists = VALUES(assists), yellow_cards = VALUES(yellow_cards), red_cards = VALUES(red_cards), rating = VALUES(rating), updated_at = NOW()
